roundup.title: Google I/O 2026: Gemini 3.5 Flash, Agent Mode
roundup.subtitle: Gemini 3.5 Flash 登顶多项 agent benchmark，OpenAI Codex 同步更新 Goal mode
headline: @koraykv 公布 Gemini 3.5 Flash 在 Google I/O 发布，Terminal-Bench 2.1 达到 76.2%，MCP Atlas 83.6%，速度比前代快 4 倍。@ScaleAILabs 确认其登顶 MCP Atlas 榜首。
@OpenAI 同时推出 Codex Goal mode，支持 Mac 应用安全调用与 Appshots 功能，@cursor_ai 则开放 Composer 2.5 SDK，让开发者用 Python/TS 构建自定义 agent。
@karpathy 宣布加入 Anthropic，@nottombrown 透露 Anthropic 将在 Colossus 2 扩展 GB200 集群，显示前沿 LLM 训练资源持续向大厂集中。
@vllm_project 首日支持 Cohere Command A+（218B MoE / 25B active），@JayAlammar 强调其开源 Apache 2.0 协议与单 B200 部署能力。

deepDives.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash 正式发布
deepDives.summary: Google 在 I/O 大会推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash，主打 agentic coding 与低延迟推理，已在多个 leaderboard 取得领先。

facts.text: Gemini 3.5 Flash 在 Terminal-Bench 2.1 得分 76.2%。
MCP Atlas 得分 83.6%，并登顶 @ScaleAILabs 榜首。
推理速度比前代快 4 倍。

bullish.text: sustained frontier-level performance at lightning-quick speeds

bullets.text: OpenAI Codex 新增 Goal mode，支持 Mac 应用安全调用。
/goal 配合规划步骤可显著提升 coding agent 效率。
Cohere Command A+ 发布，218B MoE / 25B active 参数。
DeepSeek-V4-Pro 折扣永久化，降低推理成本。
vLLM 支持 Command A+ 首日上线，并实现 Elastic Expert Parallelism。

talentMoves.text: Karpathy 加入 Anthropic 预训练团队。

topTweets.author: @koraykv
topTweets.text: Gemini 3.5 Flash 发布，Terminal-Bench 76.2%，4x 速度提升。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 直接公布核心 benchmark 数据，影响 agent 选型

topTweets.author: @OpenAI
topTweets.text: Codex 新增 Goal mode 与 Mac 应用调用功能。
topTweets.whyItMatters: AI 编码代理重大产品更新

topTweets.author: @karpathy
topTweets.text: 正式加入 Anthropic，专注前沿 LLM。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 人才流动标志行业重点变化

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: 首日支持 Command A+，218B MoE / 25B active。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源 MoE 模型推理部署新选项

takeaways: Gemini 3.5 Flash 已成 agentic coding 的高性价比选择，建议立即在 Cursor/VS Code 中测试。
Goal mode 与 /goal 模式正在成为 coding agent 的标准工作流，需更新 harness 设计。
Command A+ 单卡部署特性适合本地 agent 原型验证，vLLM 已提供 Day-0 支持。
关注 Anthropic GB200 集群扩容，预示下一代模型训练资源竞争加剧。

items.author: @garrytan
items.text: Gradient descent for SKILL.md files... SkillOpt is one of the first papers to treat markdown skill files as trainable parameters... 1. The validation gate is the only thing that matters... 4. The harness is becoming less important; the skill is becoming more important.
items.whyItMatters: SkillOpt 论文：将技能文件视为可训练参数，优化 agent。

items.author: @omarsar0
items.text: /goal is really insane! It's how you can get the most out of coding agents today. For efficiency, I find it works best when you do planning before /goal.
items.whyItMatters: 规划 + /goal 显著提升 coding agent 效率与效果

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: StepAudio 2.5: one model for speech recognition, synthesis, and live dialogue. A unified audio-language foundation model...
items.whyItMatters: 统一音频语言模型 StepAudio 2.5 发布，支持 ASR/TTS/对话

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: We just launched the ability to build native Android apps directly in Google AI Studio for free! Since launch last week, people have created more than 250,000 Android apps.
items.whyItMatters: 250k+ Android 应用快速生成

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: Cerebras represents a whole NVL72 rack on a single wafer. By routing around defects and staying on-die, they bypass the networking power bottleneck...
items.whyItMatters: Cerebras 单晶圆 NVL72 级硬件创新

items.author: @GergelyOrosz
items.text: That feeling of: "I'm in the middle of the code... oh, this is such a nasty hack. OK, let me clean it up as I go. [2 hours pass] OK, it's done..." It just never happens as organically as I use AI agents.
items.whyItMatters: AI agents 改变代码重构习惯，值得关注

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.text: RAG retrieves documents. Context graphs retrieve relationships. @steveonjava from Neo4j shows why graph-based context is the next unlock for agentic systems. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eW_vxrjvERk
items.whyItMatters: 图上下文或成Agentic系统下一关键

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: Prices updated. For those people who placed orders, you have 5 days to land payment or they will be cancelled and you'll have to reorder at the new price.
items.whyItMatters: Tinybox GPU硬件价格更新，影响推理部署成本

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: Introducing Command A+: Making sovereign agentic capabilities available to all https://cohere.com/blog/command-a-plus
items.whyItMatters: Command A+ 正式发布，强调主权 agentic 能力

items.author: @sarahookr
items.text: snazzy new autoscientist page on the @adaption_ai website Beta is now open :)
items.whyItMatters: 自主 R&D 自动化与 harness 设计对 AI Engineer 关键

items.author: @dzhng
items.text: Just made Grok 4.3 free on @duetchat
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.3 在 duetchat 免费开放，工具调用领先。

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: /goal is the simplest way to get your Hermes Agent running autonomously. you give the agent a standing goal. after every turn, a judge model checks if it's complete. if not, Hermes auto-continues with the judge's reasoning. the loop runs until the goal is met, you pause it, or the turn token budget runs out.
items.whyItMatters: 实用 agent 自主多步任务循环框架与模板

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: AI gives people more leverage to do their best work. Our CEO Jensen Huang shares how AI assistants can help teams move faster, think bigger and take on challenges that were once out of reach.
items.whyItMatters: Jensen 谈 AI 助手提升团队生产力

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: Highlights from today’s Codex Thursday launches: 1️⃣ Codex can now securely use apps on your Mac from your phone... 2️⃣ Appshots... 3️⃣ Goal mode is now available... 4️⃣ Advanced annotation mode...
items.whyItMatters: Codex 新 Goal mode 与计算机使用功能，AI 编码代理重大更新

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: With the Cursor SDK, you can build your own agents with Composer 2.5. It's now available in Python and TypeScript. This long weekend, Composer usage is 90% off in the SDK.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor SDK 开放构建自定义 Agent，Composer 2.5 支持 Python/TS

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: Last month we launched Project Glasswing... we and our partners have found more than ten thousand high- or critical-severity vulnerabilities in essential software.
items.whyItMatters: Claude 发现超万级关键漏洞，AI 网络安全研究新进展

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Two updates to auto mode: · Now available on the Pro plan · Sonnet 4.6 is now supported, alongside Opus 4.7
items.whyItMatters: Claude auto mode 支持 Pro 计划与 Sonnet 4.6，提升 agent 可用性

items.author: @ZyphraAI
items.text: Backprop strongly shapes the GPU hardware AI runs on today. Learning algorithms without backprop open new opportunities for neuromorphic silicon... Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21568
items.whyItMatters: 无反向传播学习算法新论文

items.author: @deepseek_ai
items.text: We are making our discount permanent! 🎉 Enjoy building with DeepSeek-V4-Pro and bring your innovative ideas to life! 🚀
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek-V4-Pro 折扣永久化，降低推理成本

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: An AI agent deleted an entire production database in 9 seconds last month. No rollback. No recovery. Every sandboxing approach falls into 3 modes. Knowing which you need matters more than which solution you pick.
items.whyItMatters: 企业级 agent 执行沙箱安全模式分析

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Sonic 3.5 is now the #1 text to speech model on the @ArtificialAnlys leaderboard! You no longer have to trade off quality and latency - Sonic 3.5 also has the fastest time to first audio at 82ms end to end. See full benchmark results 👇
items.whyItMatters: Sonic-3.5 登顶 TTS Arena 榜首，质量+延迟双优。

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Update: *Weekly* Gemini quotas on all paid @Antigravity tiers have just been tripled (again!), and quotas are officially reset (again!).
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 付费配额再翻 3 倍，开发者构建不受限。

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Rubric-based rewards are now standard for open-ended RL. But higher rubric scores don’t always mean better models. Our latest research shows models can learn to optimize the rubric-verifier setup itself, improving checklist coverage while broader quality declines. Robust post-training needs stronger verifiers and bette
items.whyItMatters: RL 训练 reward hacking 问题分析，需更好 verifier

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Elastic Expert Parallelism changes that. One API call resizes a live deployment... standby comm groups... EPLB redistributes experts... no restart.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM MoE 弹性专家并行，支持在线扩缩容，无需重启

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: The latest LangChain Academy course on monitoring production agents shows you how to use LangSmith to: 💸 Track costs 📊 Uncover trends... 📈 Monitor quality and latency
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith 生产 Agent 监控课程上线，追踪成本/质量/延迟

items.author: @karpathy
items.text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative.
items.whyItMatters: Karpathy 加盟 Anthropic 预训练团队，标志前沿 LLM 研发重点。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: DeepSeek V4 Flash has topped the weekly leaderboard
items.whyItMatters: 新模型登顶周榜，性能信号强

items.author: @_akhaliq
items.text: Mix-Quant Quantized Prefilling, Precise Decoding for Agentic LLMs paper: https://huggingface.co/papers/2605.20315
items.whyItMatters: Agentic LLM 量化新方法论文

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Move from question to insight faster with the AI first Colab, powered by Gemini. Everything you need to accelerate your data science workflow is here.
items.whyItMatters: AI-first Colab 上线，提升数据科学效率

items.author: @fal
items.text: 🚨 FLUX Erase from @bfl_ml is here on fal! 🧹 Object removal, text erasure and detail cleanup from a single image
items.whyItMatters: FLUX Erase 模型上线 fal，支持精准图像编辑

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Aleph 2.0 is here. Now you can edit a single frame in your video, preview the change and then Aleph 2.0 carries that edit across the rest of your video. Try it now in the new Edit Studio on web.
items.whyItMatters: 视频编辑模型 Aleph 2.0 发布，支持多镜头 1080p 编辑

items.author: @victorialslocum
items.text: Most content creators spend hours tracking trends and writing posts. We automated it with Weaviate, Gemini, and way too much coffee... https://t.co/sSn27M5ZaC
items.whyItMatters: 向量+LLM自动化内容生成实战案例

items.author: @LoubnaBenAllal1
items.text: Sequence design, variant effect, and learned representations are the main applications of genomic models. This paper does a good breakdown... Demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/HuggingFaceBio/carbon-demo 93% acc on ClinVar
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face 发布基因组模型 Carbon，ClinVar 93% 准确率，生物 AI 新应用

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Turns out you never really needed µP, you just needed to scale the embedding learning rate by model width
items.whyItMatters: 挑战 μP 假设，提供 embedding LR 缩放新洞见

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: Better open-weights work starts with better datasets, and teams need to be able to build their own. Which is why we're so excited @adaption_ai is joining the Laguna XS Research Hackathon.
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型训练数据与 hackathon 机会

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: 🚀 Introduce Hy-MT2: New Open-Source Multilingual Translation Model. Hy-MT2 is a powerful multilingual model supporting seamless translation across 33 languages — and it's fully open-source! It's 7B and 30B-A3B models achieve state-of-the-art performance among all open-source models on various translation tasks, surpas
items.whyItMatters: 开源翻译模型 SOTA 发布，支持 33 语言与本地推理

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🎉 Day-0 vLLM support for Command A+! ... 218B MoE / 25B active... Serve it now in vLLM!
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 首日支持 Cohere Command A+ 开源 MoE 模型

items.author: @code
items.text: 🔎 More in @code this week: keep agent sessions alive on a remote machine via SSH or dev tunnels... set which models handle commit messages and titles.
items.whyItMatters: VS Code 新增 agent 会话持久化与模型配置功能

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: ai studio mobile: build your ideas, wherever you are coming soon to an app store near you
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 移动端即将上线

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Introducing Gemini for Science, a collection of science tools and experiments designed to accelerate the speed and scale of scientific exploration.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini for Science 发布，加速科研工作流

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: You can now add an interpreter to deep agents with two lines of code. This enables some capabilities that were either locked behind provider APIs, or too hard to adopt in a meaningful way. Go read this write up for more info on what this is and how to use it!
items.whyItMatters: Agent 代码执行能力开源抽象，降低实现门槛

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: To scale open research, we’re launching Sprints: Propose experiments, create public environments, submit configs. An agent manages the queue and approves jobs to run for free. First track: Reward Hacking.
items.whyItMatters: 开源众包研究平台启动，奖励黑客赛道每月更新

items.author: @LangChain_JS
items.text: ICYMI: You can now give your agents an in-memory TypeScript interpreter to enable some novel agent capabilities. Built using oxc and quickjs. See this writeup on how to use it!
items.whyItMatters: JS 版 agent 内存解释器，支持新型能力

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: Out today! Our most capable agentic model: Runs on one B200, 48 languages (including العربية, 日本語, 한국어), Open source (Apache 2.0), Multimodal: text + images, 218B Mixture-of-Experts model, 25B active parameters
items.whyItMatters: Cohere 开源强力 agentic 多模态模型，单卡部署，AI 工程师可直接用

items.author: @nottombrown
items.text: We’re expanding our partnership with @SpaceX, and will be scaling up on GB200 capacity in Colossus 2 throughout June. Appreciate @elonmusk and the team helping us find good homes for the Claudes.
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic 大规模 GB200 集群扩容，AI 算力需求信号

items.author: @code
items.text: ⚡ Gemini 3.5 Flash is now available in @code. Give it a try!
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Flash 加入 Copilot，支持 agentic coding 工作流

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Computer use turns Claude into an agent that can operate real UIs. New blog post on making it reliable in production...
items.whyItMatters: Claude computer use 生产级可靠性优化指南发布

items.author: @METR_Evals
items.text: Overall, we think that AI agents plausibly had the means, motive, and opportunity to launch a minimal “rogue deployment,” but lacked the means to make rogue deployments robust to serious efforts to shut them down.
items.whyItMatters: 前沿 AI agent 风险评估实证报告，含 200+ 页附录

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Universal-3 Pro just got better across the board. 🚀 Five upgrades, live now: 🌎 Code-switching: ~19% relative WER improvement... 🗣️ Disfluencies: ~5.9%... ⚡ Turnaround time: P50 latency up to 30% faster... 👥 Diarization: 19%... ⏱️ Timestamps: +15%... Full breakdown: https://t.co/rKhRIjNVqp
items.whyItMatters: 语音模型 Universal-3 Pro 多项 benchmark 显著提升，自动更新。

items.author: @koraykv
items.text: Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers sustained frontier-level performance at lightning-quick speeds: Beats 3.1 Pro on coding & agentic benchmarks Terminal-Bench 2.1 (76.2%), GDPval-AA (1656 Elo) and MCP Atlas (83.6%) 4x faster than other frontier models
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Flash 发布，coding/agentic benchmark 领先，速度极快

items.author: @koraykv
items.text: Today at Google I/O, we introduced Gemini 3.5 Flash! ... We used a team of agents in Antigravity 2.0 to recreate the original AlphaZero research paper...
items.whyItMatters: Google I/O 重磅发布 Gemini 3.5 Flash，agent 团队演示 AlphaZero 重现

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: so good to see more local model builders getting their hands on NVIDIA DGX Spark. Laguna XS.2 already runs on DGX Spark. you can run XS.2 through vLLM, SGLang, and Ollama today, with TRT-LLM support coming soon.
items.whyItMatters: 本地 agentic coding 模型支持新硬件与推理框架

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Congrats to @GoogleDeepMind for releasing Gemini 3.5 Flash and topping our MCP Atlas leaderboard! 🥇
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Flash 在 MCP Atlas leaderboard 登顶
